title: Convert header nav and hero 4th div content to bullet point lists

requirements.text: In the Header component (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx), reformat the navigation items inside the header's inner div (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]) as a bullet point list — render each nav link/item as a list item within an unordered list, styled to remain horizontal and visually consistent with the existing warm theme.
acceptanceCriteria: The header inner div's navigation items are rendered inside a <ul> with <li> elements.
Each nav link appears as a bullet-styled list item.
The header layout remains usable and does not break on mobile or desktop.
Existing functionality (routing, auth state display, admin/staff links) is preserved.

requirements.text: In the WelcomeBanner component (frontend/src/components/WelcomeBanner.tsx), reformat the content inside the 4th child div of the hero section (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/section[1]/div[1]/div[4]) as a clean bullet point list — convert any inline, paragraph, or grid-style content in that div into an unordered list of scannable bullet items, using the same yellow/white warm theme styling already applied to the hero.
acceptanceCriteria: The 4th div inside the hero section's inner container renders its content as a <ul> with <li> bullet items.
Each bullet item is clearly readable against the yellow/white hero background.
No paragraph blocks or flat inline text remain in that div — all content is bullet-listed.
The visual style (font, colour, spacing) is consistent with the existing WelcomeBanner yellow theme.

constraints: Only modify the two targeted elements identified by their XPaths — do not alter any other sections of the Header or WelcomeBanner.
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/.
Preserve all existing functionality and routing logic in the Header.
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall header layout or navigation structure beyond bullet formatting.
Changing the hero section's colour scheme, glow effect, or other visual tokens.
